epigraph.quote: When I woke early there were 20 cows (black & billed) & 2 hares in the field.

moments.quote: We left St. George's at 9.30. pm after a Malawi Concert
It was dark when we arrived & where we thought there was a bridge across the A road, the rutted road was blocked by old tractors
They live in a nice modern house built on what were the WCs near our old house!
There was a priest's hole which we managed to climb into & beautiful embroidery by Mary Queen of Scots & Bess of Hardwick.
We walked at 10pm into a wood with ponds & yews & bats.

images.caption: Blickling Hall, Norfolk, East front from parterre

moments.quote: It was a marvellous band - keyboard, guitar, drums, clarinet/sax, trumpet, trombone. They play at noon every Sunday.
A large lake, which we walked round with Tonie — exceedingly hot.

images.caption: Bucking Hall, Norfolk, The Long Gallery

moments.quote: The campsite owner is friendly & has sold me some eggs.
Then we set off for Oundle on the R. Nene to Fairline Marina where Chad is hoping to do lights.
Simon home-made beefburgers & Eve scampi & chips at Upper Benefield in a shady garden.
On to Corby where Chad hopes a factory will do extruded aluminium.
There was a very smart woman dressed in Buddhist colours (& matching handbag) having tea.
